svg.title: Pricing engine inputs and daily rate sheet flow
svg.desc: Four input categories — capital markets data, loan-level price adjustments, product and lock terms, and lender business inputs — feed a pricing engine that produces the daily rate sheet with a base price grid, adjustment tables, and lock policies, repricing intraday when the MBS market moves.

g.text: ↻ Reprices intraday whenever the MBS market moves enough
